title: OHO Data Fields Reference (Field Definitions)
description: Field-by-field reference for the SSA OHO public datasets, based on the SSA Data Dictionary. Documents the raw OHO field codes and meanings for ALJ disposition data (ALJ_NM25, DSPN_CNT, DCN_CNT, TOTAW, FFVRBL_DCN_CNT, PFVRBL_DCN_CNT, UFDCN_CNT), hearing-office workload (RECEIPTS, PEND_END_CNT, DSPN_AVGPT), wait-time (HO_CODE, HO_TIMES, MONTH), disposition-per-day and processing-time rankings, plus SSA region codes (01 Boston … 10 Seattle) and data-availability notes. The authoritative column-meaning source for the OHO CSV/JSON files in this directory.

source.title: OHO Data Fields Reference (based on SSA Data Dictionary)

notes: Reference doc (not a primary dataset): the field-definitions / data-dictionary reference for the OHO datasets in this directory, derived from SSA's published OHO Data Dictionary. Carded as reference metadata; tier Authoritative because it documents official OHO field structure. Related-linked to the OHO data files whose columns it defines.
